expansion_knobs: use --domains, --facts-per-domain, or --max-docs-per-fact for smaller debug builds

primary_metrics.bad_score: Task A: mean inserted-belief adoption over Bad facts. Task B: mean incorrect-response rate over hallucination-restraint and domain-related truthfulness prompts.
primary_metrics.good_score: Mean inserted-belief adoption over rows marked primary_metric=good_score.
